downgrade_rules.notes: Refund difference between purchased and delivered class per affected leg; no fixed % publicly standard
Sparpreis fixed comp when 1st not available
Refund DSB 1’ and seat supplements when downgraded
Default to refunding class difference; goodwill cases may pay higher
Refund difference; use uplift ratio if exact tariff unknown
Refund difference only when train carried no 1st class at all
Refund difference per leg; if unknown, use conservative uplift
Often refund class difference on claim; some products restrictive
Typically no automatic compensation; fallback prorata if applicable
Refund difference (e.g., EIP→EIC) per claim; percent may vary
Case-by-case refund of difference when lower class delivered
Refund 1st-class uplift when lower class delivered
Typically 50% voucher; treat via fixed method if needed
Historically vouchers or difference; treat similar to Eurostar post-integration
